title: Stack Definition
description: Defines a government or organizational software stack (e.g., Germany Stack) with item recommendations and participant metadata

name.description: Localized display name of the stack

description.description: Optional localized description of the stack's purpose

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'DE', 'AT', 'EU' for multi-country)

issuer.description: Organization or authority responsible for this stack definition

items.description: Items included in this stack with participation and status metadata

itemId.description: Reference to an item ID from data/items/

since.description: ISO 8601 date when this item was added to the stack

note.description: Optional localized note or rationale for inclusion

participants.description: Organizations/people involved with this item in this stack context

name.description: Name of the participant (organization or person)

jurisdiction.description: ISO country code or 'EU' — relevant for funders to flag non-EU dependencies

url.description: URL to participant's website or project page (optional)

since.description: ISO 8601 date when this participant joined (optional)
